title: Can you guys rate my algo overall P&L?
author: Kind_Shop_3846
selftext: Hey guys, I’m new to algo trading. I recently found an app that I’ve been using to study and test my ideas, and the algo trading bot there has been really helpful in validating my strategies. I wanted to share my P&L results so far and get some honest feedback. Still a beginner, so any tips or advice from experienced traders would mean a lot. Thanks!

comments.author: 6biz
comments.body:
Hey Op!

Looks good, but need to know what’s with the break-evens - pending and unfilled orders? 

Is it running on demo?

What’s the TP/SL logic? The risk to reward looks good!

comments.author: Kind_Shop_3846
comments.body:
I’m running everything on a demo account for now since I’m still testing.

I haven’t added break-even or pending order logic yet, so at the moment it just opens and closes trades directly. For the TP/SL I’m keeping it simple, using about a 1:2 risk to reward,usually risking around 1% per trade.

Still a beginner, so I’m focusing on keeping it consistent and then later I’ll improve with things like break-even and partial orders.

comments.author: No_Page5992
comments.body:
Hey OP, overall p&l looks fine!

I've got a qeustion for you:
I am in co-operation with a another programmer, and are still in full-development in an full automated trading bot, using my own strategy.
With this, i have created a community, in which i share many details regarding this project.
Including lessons on why and how my bot works.

But my programmer is only specialized in Ctrader, so i'll only work with him on this platform, but i'd like to expand my reach, and with this our possibilities.
My qeustion for you, would you like to join my team?

My vision is whenever people work together, we can get so much more done.
By working together and share our vision, we can reach our goals much faster!

Let me know what you think.
